title: centaurea langei subsp. coutinhoi
intro: Centaurea langei subsp. coutinhoi, also known as Coutinho's knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its flavonoid and sesquiterpene content. The health benefits of Coutinho's knapweed include its potential to treat wounds, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
